text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking around for Trainer Kiryuin<n>to invite
her out for the day, when...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Now let's focus on timing. Lightly<n>plant your toes,
and use your right foot<n>as a pivot point.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: My right foot...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Correct. Keep your movements small,<n>and
remember to stay flexible.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: How about it? Do you think you can<n>do it?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Let me think.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After saying that, Happy Meek<n>moves over by
the window.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At a glance, it appears like she's just<n>staring
blankly at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Trainer Kiryuin watches her placidly.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This continues on, undisturbed, for<n>about thirty
minutes.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer <username>! Nice to see<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Something akin to visualization.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
She likes to imagine her own<n>movements while
gazing up at the<n>sky. That's just how she's
always<n>done it.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is watch over her until she<n>feels
she's got it.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
As per the Trainer's Handbook, "One<n>should
respect the heart of an<n>Umamusume."

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, another thirty minutes pass.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When Happy Meek returns, she<n>performs the
dance flawlessly.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Surprised?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks. That's one of her<n>many talents.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Once she's able to visualize<n>something, she can
do it perfectly<n>without any further issues.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course, she still needs the physical<n>prowess
to perfectly execute the<n>movements in her head.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But since she's always training hard,<n>that's no
problem for her.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: It's no easy task to keep working<n>like that.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I really respect her, from the bottom<n>of my heart.
choice_data_list: I understand that feeling very well.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: You do?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Having a respectable trainee is one of<n>the
greatest joys a trainer can<n>experience, wouldn't
you say?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But... there's another person who I<n>also respect.
Someone very close by,<n>in fact.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's a little embarrassing...<n>Let's just say
it's a secret.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>. From here on out,<n>both as
peers and as rivals...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Let's keep giving it our best!
